en.ch0PageTitle: Challenge 0 â€” Set up your email
en.ch0Step1Heading: How to set up your Gmail account
en.ch0Step1VideoPH: How-to clips â€” Create a Gmail account, set up a password, and complete phone verification
en.ch0Step2Heading: Practice setting up an email account
en.ch0Step2Intro: Rosa needs to create a Gmail account so she can register for MyChart.
en.ch0Step2Intro2: Help her choose an email address, create a password, and verify her phone number.
en.ch0Step3Label: Step 3 of 3 â€” Do it on your phone
en.ch0Step3Heading: Now set up your own email account
en.ch0Step3Intro: Open a web browser on your phone and follow these steps:
en.ch0Check1: Open a web browser. Go to the Gmail website. Tap "Create account." Enter your first and last name. Choose a new email address. Tap "Next."
en.ch0Check2: Type your chosen password. Type your password again to confirm. Tap "Next."
en.ch0Check3: Enter your phone number. Tap "Next." Type the code you received in a text message. Tap "Verify."
en.ch0Check4: Write your email address on your card. Write your password on your card.
